name: flags-open-security-group
input:
Review this Terraform:
```hcl
resource "aws_security_group_rule" "allow_all" {
  type        = "ingress"
  from_port   = 0
  to_port     = 65535
  protocol    = "tcp"
  cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"]
}
```

name: flags-missing-tags
input:
Review this Terraform:
```hcl
resource "aws_instance" "web" {
  ami           = "ami-12345"
  instance_type = "t3.micro"
}
```

name: approves-good-config
description: No false positives on well-configured resource

name: flags-missing-backend
